summary: Implemented configuration versioning and session cleanup cron job. Added proper validation and migration support for config versions, and automatic cleanup scheduling with configurable intervals.
details: Configuration versioning: Added applyConfigVersioning function to validate and migrate configuration versions. Session cleanup: Added startCleanupCron and stopCleanupCron methods to automatically clean up old sessions based on maxAgeMs parameter (default: 24 hours). Both implementations include proper error handling and logging.
